cases.title: The Whitechapel Cipher
cases.synopsis: A series of coded messages left at murder scenes in Whitechapel points to a conspiracy that reaches from the rookeries to the halls of power.

cases.title: The Mayfair Séance
cases.synopsis: A society séance at Lady Ashworth's Mayfair townhouse turns deadly when the veil between worlds proves thinner than anyone expected.

cases.title: The Lamplighter's Wake
cases.synopsis: A Lamplighter agent is found dead in a locked room in Whitechapel. Scotland Yard calls it suicide. The Lamplighters suspect otherwise — and the trail leads to the Gasworks, where the Court of Smoke is trafficking in things that should not exist.

cases.title: A Matter of Shadows
cases.synopsis: A Lamplighter courier has gone missing in Southwark with a package that was never meant to exist.

cases.title: The Rationalist's Dilemma
cases.synopsis: A Rationalist scientist's experiment has produced results that defy explanation. The Circle wants it debunked — or buried.

cases.title: The Debt of Smoke
cases.synopsis: A Court of Smoke contact comes to you with a personal problem — someone in the Court is trying to kill them, and the reason involves a stolen artifact.

cases.title: The Unfinished Case
cases.synopsis: A loose thread from the Whitechapel Cipher surfaces in a pawnshop, and the trail leads to an unresolved murder that predates the events of the first case.
